H2O is the chemical formula for water, consisting of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.

Clue: The planet closest to the sun.
Explanation: Mercury is the smallest planet in our solar system and the closest to the sun, orbiting at an average distance of about 36 million miles.

Clue: The year World War II ended.
Explanation: World War II ended in 1945 when Japan surrendered after atomic bombs were dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki.

Explanation: George Washington served as the first President of the United States from 1789 to 1797 and is known as the "Father of His Country".
